User volunteered at the Coastal Cleanup event on March 7th (mentioned in Session 1). User also participated in the "Walk for Hunger" 5K walk on February 21st (mentioned in Session 2). To calculate days between: February 21 to February 28 = 7 days, March 1 to March 7 = 7 days, total = 14 days.

The user participated in the "Walk for Hunger" 5K walk on February 21st. The user also volunteered at the "Coastal Cleanup" event on March 7th. Both dates are in 2023. To find the number of days between the events: February has 28 days in 2023 (non-leap year), so from February 21st to February 28th is 7 days, then add the 7 days in March (1st through 7th), totaling 14 days. Alternatively, simply calculate: March 7 - February 21 = 14 days. The user asked this question in Session 2 on March 14th, 2023.
